address_carry_law.ordinary_gate: one natural exponent C forces ell_n=0 whenever D_n>floor(log2(C))+1
address_carry_law.status: research derivation; companion Lean request QM166
address_carry_law.uniform_finite_consequence: a nonzero carry after n completed cells requires C>=2^(55*n-1)

selector_complexity.bounded_aperiodic_symbols: not excluded; Morse-Hedlund forces factor complexity p(k)>=k+1
selector_complexity.counter_growth_scope: c_n or b_n need not tend to infinity; what must grow is runtime chart depth, and a bounded selector must retain unbounded word complexity
selector_complexity.eventually_periodic_symbols: universally impossible: a period composes to (3^P*H+K)/2^L with 3^P>2^L and K>0
selector_complexity.kernel_checked_support: ShortcutParityPeriodicNoGo already excludes periodic and ultimately periodic concatenations of outward shortcut blocks

audit.meaning: bounded exact arithmetic CEGIS on coherent nested exponent cylinders for alternating writer--resonant-decoder cells
